endpoints.name: POST /v1beta/{billingAccount}:estimateCostScenario
endpoints.description: Use custom pricing in the estimate, using a `CostScenario` with a defined `billingAccount`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BILLINGACCOUNT}} with a real billingaccount.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta:estimateCostScenario
endpoints.description: Estimate list prices using a `CostScenario` without a defined `billingAccount`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.
